Blake's lvl ≥ 3@@ <<else>> @@.notmc-speech;Well, listen...<br> At first, things went well, of course, sometimes the ghost tried to...@@<<linkappend "@@.notmc-speechLink; scare me@@">> <<set _checkR to random(1,5)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/2.0.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/2.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/2.3.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 4>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/2.4.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 5>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/2.5.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> @@.notmc-speech;But I'm not easily frightened! <br> I continued searching for evidence.<br> The ghost became more aggressive... Sometimes it tried to @@<<linkappend "@@.notmc-speechLink;chocke me@@">> <<set _checkR to random(1,8)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone2.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone2.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone2.3.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 4>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/3.0.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 5>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/3.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 6>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/3.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 7>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/3.3.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 8>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/3.4.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> @@.notmc-speech;But I was stronger than it...<br> I was about to find the last piece of evidence when suddenly@@ <<linkappend "@@.notmc-speechLink;it appeared right in front of me.@@">> <<set _checkR to random(1,6)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.3.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 4>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.4.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 5>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.5.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<elseif _checkR eq 6>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/blake/alone3.6.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> @@.notmc-speech;I lost control... and I might have given it what it had been after from the beginning...@@<br> <<if _resultBlakeAlone eq 1>>@@.notmc-speech; After it cu... weakened, I ran away. That’s it. @@<br> @@.mc-speech; I knew you would succeed! Great job!@@<<elseif _resultBlakeAlone eq 0>> @@.notmc-speech;It seems I just passed out.. I woke up when it was already morning. <br> That’s it.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; It's okay, you'll definitely succeed next time!@@<br> @@.notmc-speech;You're right, I need to teach it a lesson for what it did to me...@@<</if>> <</linkappend>> <</linkappend>> <</linkappend>> <</if>> <</linkappend>> <br> <br> <<done>> <<addclass ".linkselector" "disabled-link">> <</done>> @@.backbtn; [[Back|previous()][$blakeChooseOwaissa to 0; $blakeChooseElm to 0]] <</nobr>><<nobr>> <<if $blake.lvl eq 2>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneOwaissaBlake to 25>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneElmBlake to 10>> <<elseif $blake.lvl eq 3>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneOwaissaBlake to 40>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneElmBlake to 25>> <<elseif $blake.lvl eq 4>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneOwaissaBlake to 55>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneElmBlake to 40>> <<elseif $blake.lvl gte 5>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneOwaissaBlake to 70>> <<set $chanceToSuccessAloneElmBlake to 55>> <</if>> <div class="flexwrapperCompanionMainInfo"> <div class="companionImageMain"> <img src="assets/blake/blake.png"> </div> <div class="companionTextMain"> <span style="color: yellow; font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.2em;">$blake.name :</span> $blake.lvl lvl <<if $blake.lvl gte 5>> (max. lvl)<<else>>($blake.exp / $blake.expForNextLvl)<</if>><br> <<if $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone eq 2>> @@.mc-speech; [[Ask her how her ghost hunt went.|BlakeHuntEndAlone]]@@<br> <<else>> @@.mc-speech;<<link "Ask Blake to join you for ghost hunting tonight.">> <<set $companion to clone($blake)>> <<set $isCompChosenBlake to 1>> <<set $isCompChosenAlice to 0>> <<set $isCompChosenBrook to 0>> <<set $isCompChosenAlex to 0>> <<set $isCompChosenTaylor to 0>> <<set $isCompChosenCasey to 0>> <<set $chosenPlan to 0>> <<set $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone to 0>> <<set $blakeChooseOwaissa to 0>> <<set $blakeChooseElm to 0>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswer">>@@.mc-speech; I want you to join me for ghost hunting today@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Yes, of course. I'll be ready. Let's meet by the entrance to the haunted house, okay?@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Yeah, let's do that.@@<</replace>> <</link>>@@<br> <span class="CompanionInfoAskForHuntAlone"> @@.mc-speech;<<link "I’d like you to go ghost hunting alone.">> <<set $isCompChosenBlake to 0>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswer">>@@.notmc-speech; I think I'm already experienced enough to do it on my own. Where should I go?@@<br> @@.enterbtn;<<link "Owaissa Street - $chanceToSuccessAloneOwaissaBlake %">> <<set $blakeChooseOwaissa to 1>> <<set $blakeChooseElm to 0>> <<set $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone to 1>> <<if (ndef $payForHuntAloneBlake or $payForHuntAloneBlake eq 0) and $mc.money gte 20>><<set $mc.money -= 20>><<set $payForHuntAloneBlake to 1>><</if>> <<if $mc.money lt 20>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswerTwo">>@@.warningtext; I don't have enough money to buy her a contract @@<</replace>> <<else>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswerTwo">>@@.notmc-speech;Owaissa Street? Hmm... Yes, of course. I think I can handle it.@@<</replace>><</if>><</link>>@@@@color: green; <b>-20$</b>@@<br> @@.enterbtn;<<link "Elm Street - $chanceToSuccessAloneElmBlake %">> <<set $blakeChooseOwaissa to 0>> <<set $blakeChooseElm to 1>> <<set $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone to 1>> <<if (ndef $payForHuntAloneBlake or $payForHuntAloneBlake eq 0) and $mc.money gte 20>><<set $mc.money -= 20>><<set $payForHuntAloneBlake to 1>><</if>> <<if $mc.money lt 20>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswerTwo">>@@.warningtext; I don't have enough money to buy her a contract @@<</replace>> <<else>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswerTwo">>@@.notmc-speech;Elm Street? Hmm... Yes, of course. Blake's lvl 2+@@ <</if>></span> <br> <span id="blakeInfoAnswer"> </span> <</if>> </div> </div> <br> <<if $blake.lvl lt 2>> <<done>> <<addclass ".CompanionInfoAskForHuntAlone" "disabled-link">> <</done>> <</if>> @@.backbtn; [[Return|$return]] @@<br> <</nobr>><img src="assets/img/adultSection.jpeg" width="100%"> @@.mc-thoughts; The shelves are stocked with all sorts of items — from classic toys to those clearly meant for more experienced buyers. It's quite cozy in here.@@<br> @@.enterbtn; [[Ask the adult shop assistant|adultSectionBlake]]@@<br> @@.enterbtn; [[Buy something|adultSectionPurchase]]@@<br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Leave|Mall]]@@<br> <div class="flexwrapper backgroundForText"> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $dildoPurchased or $dildoPurchased eq 0>> <img src="assets/img/dildo.jpg" class="iconPx"><br> <span class="priceAmount">30$</span><br> <<if $mc.corruption gte 3>> <<if $mc.money gte 30>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "adultSectionPurchase">> <<set $mc.money -= 30>> <<set $dildoPurchased to 1>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; Don't think I need it@@@@.warningtext; (Req. <img src="assets/img/corruption.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:20%; display: inline; margin: 0;"> ≥ 3)@@<</if>><</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if $wardenClothesStage eq 1>> <img src="assets/img/wardrobe/warden.webp" class="iconPx"><br> <span class="priceAmount">500$</span><br> <<if $mc.corruption gte 3>> <<if $mc.money gte 500>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "adultSectionPurchase">> <<set $mc.money -= 500>> <<set $wardenClothesStage to 2>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't think I can wear this...@@@@.warningtext; (Req. <img src="assets/img/corruption.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:20%; display: inline; margin: 0;"> ≥ 3)@@<</if>><</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> </div> </div> <br> @@.backbtn;[[Leave|adultSection]] @@<br> <style> body { background-image: url('assets/img/adultSection.jpeg'); background-size: cover; background-repeat: no-repeat; } </style><img src="assets/blake/blakeShop.jpg" class="displayCentredImgs" width="50%"><br> <<if $alice.lvl gte 2 >> <<if ndef $dialogBlake>> @@.notmc-speech; Hey, you're not $mc.name by any chance, are you? Alice told me you went ghost hunting together.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Yeah, that's right.@@<br> <<set $dialogBlake to 0>> <<if def $gotCursedItem and $dialogBlake neq 1>> @@.notmc-speech;Alice mentioned that sometimes you come across… hmm, let's say, "something special." Some toys with, well, "a magical aura"?@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Yeah, you're right. But I usually give them to the witch in exchange for a fee.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech;How about selling them to me instead? I'll pay you more than the witch@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Why do you need them?@@<br> @@.notmc-speech;Well, you know, these toys aren't exactly ordinary, and I could sell them as exclusives. My shop is known for unique items, so they'll definitely find their buyer.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Hmm... I'll think about it.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action;Now you can bring cursed items to the adult store and sell them for a higher price.@@<br> <<set $dialogBlake to 1>> <<else>> @@.notmc-speech;Wow! It's amazing that you're into this stuff. Good luck!@@<br> <</if>> <<else>> @@.notmc-speech; Hi $mc.name, need any help?@@<br> <<if $gotCursedItem eq 1 and $dialogBlake eq 1>> <<linkreplace "@@.usebtn;Give her the cursed item@@">> @@.notmc-speech; Wow, thanks. Here's your money. Feel free to bring more, I'll gladly buy them from you.@@<br> Money: +60 $ <br> <<set $gotCursedItem to 0>> <<set $isCIDildo to 0>> <<set $isCIButtplug to 0>> <<set $isCIBeads to 0>> <<set $isCIHDildo to 0>> <<set $mc.money += 60>> <<if $relationshipBlake lte 4>> <<set $relationshipBlake += 1>> @@.mc-speech; Relationship with Blake increased: now $relationshipBlake!@@ <</if>> <</linkreplace>> <<else>> <</if>> <<if def $gotCursedItem and $dialogBlake neq 1>> @@.notmc-speech;Alice mentioned that sometimes you come across… hmm, let's say, "something special." I'll pay you more than the witch@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Why do you need them?@@<br> @@.notmc-speech;Well, you know, these toys aren't exactly ordinary, and I could sell them as exclusives. My shop is known for unique items, so they'll definitely find their buyer.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Hmm... I'll think about it.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action;Now you can bring cursed items to the adult store and sell them for a higher price.@@<br> <<set $dialogBlake to 1>> <</if>> <</if>> <<else>> @@.notmc-speech; Hi ,need any help?@@<br> @@.mc-speech; No, thanks, I'm just looking around.@@<br> <</if>> <<if $relationshipBlake gte 5>> <<if $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone eq 2>> @@.mc-speech; [[Ask her how her ghost hunt went.|BlakeHuntEndAlone]]@@<br> <<else>> @@.mc-speech;<<link "Ask Blake to join you for ghost hunting tonight.">> <<set $companion to clone($blake)>> <<set $isCompChosenBlake to 1>> <<set $isCompChosenAlice to 0>> <<set $isCompChosenBrook to 0>> <<set $chosenPlan to 0>> <<set $isBlakeGoingForHuntingAlone to 0>> <<set $blakeChooseOwaissa to 0>> <<set $blakeChooseElm to 0>> <<replace "#blakeInfoAnswer">>@@.mc-speech; I want you to join me for ghost hunting today@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Yes, of course. I'll be ready. Strange, she usually responds right away...<</linkreplace>> <<else>> <<if $isBrookePossessedCD lte 2>> @@.mc-thoughts;She’s probably still with Rain. $alice.name @@<br> $alice.lvl lvl <<if $alice.lvl gte 5>> (max. lvl)<<else>>($alice.exp / $alice.expForNextLvl)<</if>><br> <img src="assets/alice/alice.png" class="contactsImages"><br> <<if $hours lte 7>> <<if $isAliceGoingForHuntingAlone eq 2>> @@.mc-thoughts; border-radius: 8px; margin: 5px; max-width: 100%; } .addGap5 { gap: 5%; } </style> <<if (previous() eq "WitchEndContract") or (tags(previous()).includes("event"))>> @@.backbtn;<<back>>@@<br> <<else>> @@.backbtn;[[Return|$return]]@@<br><</if>> <<done>> <<addclass ".linkselector" "disabled-link">> <</done>> <</nobr>><<set $cursedHuntActive to 1>> <<script>> (function() { if (State.variables.cursedHuntActive === 1) { let duration = 20; let interval = 1; let lightCycle = 0; let endTime = Date.now() + duration * 1000; function toggleLights() { let isDark = lightCycle % 2 === 0; if (State.variables.isOwaissa === 1) { if (isDark) { $('body.owaissakitchen').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaKitchenDark').removeClass('owaissaKitchenLight'); $('body.owaissahallway').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaHallwayDark').removeClass('owaissaHallwayLight'); $('body.owaissabathroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaBathroomDark').removeClass('owaissaBathroomLight'); $('body.owaissabedroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaBedroomDark').removeClass('owaissaBedroomLight'); $('body.owaissalivingroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaLivingroomDark').removeClass('owaissaLivingroomLight'); } else { $('body.owaissakitchen').addClass(' smooth-transition owaissaKitchenLight').removeClass('owaissaKitchenDark'); $('body.owaissahallway').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaHallwayLight').removeClass('owaissaHallwayDark'); $('body.owaissabathroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaBathroomLight').removeClass('owaissaBathroomDark'); $('body.owaissabedroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaBedroomLight').removeClass('owaissaBedroomDark'); $('body.owaissalivingroom').addClass('smooth-transition owaissaLivingroomLight').removeClass('owaissaLivingroomDark'); } } else if (State.variables.isElm === 1) { if (isDark) { $('body.elmkitchen').addClass('smooth-transition elmKitchenDark').removeClass('elmKitchenLight'); $('body.elmhallway').addClass('smooth-transition elmHallwayDark').removeClass('elmHallwayLight'); $('body.elmhallwayupstairs').addClass('smooth-transition elmHallwayTwoDark').removeClass('elmHallwayTwoLight'); $('body.elmbathroom').addClass('smooth-transition elmBathroomDark').removeClass('elmBathroomLight'); $('body.elmbathroomtwo').addClass('smooth-transition elmBathroomTwoDark').removeClass('elmBathroomTwoLight'); $('body.elmbedroom').addClass('smooth-transition elmBedroomDark').removeClass('elmBedroomLight'); $('body.elmbedroomtwo').addClass('smooth-transition elmBedroomTwoDark').removeClass('elmBedroomTwoLight'); $('body.elmbasement').addClass('smooth-transition elmBasementDark').removeClass('elmBasementLight'); $('body.elmnursery').addClass('smooth-transition elmNurseryDark').removeClass('elmNurseryLight'); } else { $('body.elmkitchen').addClass('smooth-transition elmKitchenLight').removeClass('elmKitchenDark'); $('body.elmhallway').addClass('smooth-transition elmHallwayLight').removeClass('elmHallwayDark'); $('body.elmhallwayupstairs').addClass('smooth-transition elmHallwayTwoLight').removeClass('elmHallwayTwoDark'); $('body.elmbathroom').addClass('smooth-transition elmBathroomLight').removeClass('elmBathroomDark'); $('body.elmbathroomtwo').addClass('smooth-transition elmBathroomTwoLight').removeClass('elmBathroomTwoDark'); $('body.elmbedroom').addClass('smooth-transition elmBedroomLight').removeClass('elmBedroomDark'); $('body.elmbedroomtwo').addClass('smooth-transition elmBedroomTwoLight').removeClass('elmBedroomTwoDark'); $('body.elmbasement').addClass('smooth-transition elmBasementLight').removeClass('elmBasementDark'); $('body.elmnursery').addClass('smooth-transition elmNurseryLight').removeClass('elmNurseryDark'); } } lightCycle++; if (Date.now() < endTime) { setTimeout(toggleLights, interval * 1000); } else { $('.cursedHuntLinkDisable').removeClass('disabled-linkSpecial'); if (State.variables.ghost.name === "Deogen") { if (State.variables.isInHideSpot === 1 && State.variables.cursedHuntActive === 1) { State.variables.cursedHuntActive = 0; Engine.play("cursedHuntStart"); } else if ((State.variables.isInHideSpot === 0 || State.variables.isInHideSpot == null) && State.variables.cursedHuntActive === 1) { State.variables.cursedHuntActive = 0; } } else { if ((State.variables.isInHideSpot === 0 || State.variables.isInHideSpot == null) && State.variables.cursedHuntActive === 1) { State.variables.cursedHuntActive = 0; Engine.play("cursedHuntStart"); } else { State.variables.cursedHuntActive = 0; } } } } toggleLights(); } })(); <</script>><img src="assets/rescue/down.png" class="upPointer clickable" onclick="SugarCube.Engine.play('CityMap');"> <div class="flexwrapper"> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/1.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 1]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/2.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 2]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/3.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 3]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/4.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 4]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/5.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 5]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/6.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 6]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/7.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 9]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/10.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 10]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/11.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 11]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/12.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 12]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/13.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 13]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/14.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 14]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/15.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 15]]@@ </div> <div class="housecard rescuehousecard"> <img src="assets/rescue/house/16.jpg" class="iconRescuePx"> @@.icontextcity; [[Move|rescueHouse][$rescueHouse to 16]]@@ </div> </div> <style> body { background-image: url('assets/rescue/house/rescueMap.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .iconRescuePx { width: 80px; height: auto; border-radius: 30%; } .rescuehousecard { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; } </style> <<if ($hours gte 22) or ($hours gte 0 and $hours lte 5)>> <style> body:before { content: ''; display: block; width: 100vw; height: 100vh; position: fixed; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0; background-color:rgba(0, 0, 0, .4); z-index: 1; } </style> <</if>><div style="position: relative;"> <img @src="`assets/`+'rescue/house/'+$randomRescuePhotoNumber+`.jpg`" @class="$tornStyleRandom+` hideRescueHouse`" id="rescueHouseHidden" width="100%" style="position: absolute; z-index: 10;"> <<if $rescueHouse eq 1>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/1.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 2>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/2.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 3>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/3.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 4>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/4.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 5>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/5.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 6>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/6.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 7>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/7.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 8>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/8.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 9>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/9.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 10>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/10.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 11>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/11.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 12>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/12.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 13>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/13.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 14>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/14.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 15>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/15.jpg" width="100%"> <<elseif $rescueHouse eq 16>> <img src="assets/rescue/house/16.jpg" width="100%"> <</if>> </div> <<if $hasRescueClue eq 1>> <<linkreplace "@@.usebtn;Compare the house with the photo@@">> <<removeclass "#rescueHouseHidden" "hideRescueHouse">> <<if $randomRescuePhotoNumber eq $rescueHouse>> @@.mc-speech; It seems like this is the house.@@ <<else>> @@.mc-speech; No, doesn't really look like it.@@ <</if>> <</linkreplace>><br> <</if>> <<include "add20">> <<if $hasQuestForRescue eq 2>> @@.mc-speech; The nun said that after 6 p.m. it's pointless to keep searching. It seems I’m too late. I should go back to her and tell her I failed.@@<br> <<else>> <<if $mc.energy gte 1>> <<linkreplace "@@.usebtn; Search the house @@ <img src='assets/img/energy.png' style='position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:3%; display: inline; margin: 0;'>">> <<set $mc.energy -=1>> <<if $randomRescuePhotoNumber neq $rescueHouse>> @@.mc-thoughts; You search the house for 30 minutes, but find no one.@@ <<include "add30">> <<elseif $rescueStage lt 2 and $randomRescuePhotoNumber eq $rescueHouse and $hasQuestForRescue eq 1>> <<goto "rescueEvent">> <<elseif $hasQuestForRescue eq 2>> @@.mc-speech; The nun said that after 6 p.m. it's pointless to keep searching. It seems I’m too late. I should go back to her and tell her I failed.@@<br> <</if>> <</linkreplace>><<else>> @@.mc-speech;I'm too tired to search the house.@@<br><</if>> <</if>><br> <br> @@.backbtn;[[Back|rescueMap]]@@<br>@@.mc-thoughts; You notice someone’s EMF reader. Next to it, there’s a small torn piece of a photo.<br> Your EMF reader spikes the moment you bring it close to the @@<<linkappend "@@.usebtn;fragment of the old photo.@@">> <<set $hasRescueClue to 1>> <img @src="`assets/`+'rescue/house/'+$randomRescuePhotoNumber+`.jpg`" @class="$tornStyleRandom+` displayCentredImgs`" width="50%"> <br>@@.mc-speech; Hmm, this place looks familiar… but I can’t quite remember where I’ve seen it.<br> Clearly, this photo is somehow connected to the ghost and the missing girl.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action; You found a piece of an old photo.@@<br><br> <<if $equipment.emf neq 3>><<set $equipment.emf to 3>> @@.mc-action; You picked up an EMF reader <img src="assets/img/emf.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:3%; display: inline; margin: 0;"> (Level 3).@@<</if>> <br><br> @@.backbtn; [[Continue|$return]]@@ <</linkappend>> <<done>> <<addclass ".linkselector" "disabled-link">> <</done>><<if ndef $rescueCD>> <<set $rescueCD to 0>> <</if>> <<if ndef $rescueQuestCD>> <<set $rescueQuestCD to 0>> <</if>> <<set $rescueGirls to [ {name: "Victoria", img: "rescue/victoria.jpg"}, {name: "Julia", img: "rescue/Julia.jpg"}, {name: "Jade", img: "rescue/Jade.jpg"}, {name: "Nadia", img: "rescue/Nadia.jpg"}, {name: "Ash", img: "rescue/Ash.jpg"}, ]>> <<if $rescueQuestCD eq 0>> <<if $rescueCD eq 0>> <<set $rescueCD to 1>> <<set $rescueRandomGirls to []>> <<set _index1 to random(0, $rescueGirls.length - 1)>> <<set _girl1 to $rescueGirls[_index1]>> <<set $rescueRandomGirls.push(_girl1)>> <<set _remainingGirls to $rescueGirls.filter((g, i) => i != _index1)>> <<set _index2 to random(0, _remainingGirls.length - 1)>> <<set _girl2 to _remainingGirls[_index2]>> <<set $rescueRandomGirls.push(_girl2)>> <</if>> <<if $hours >= 18 and $hours < 24 and $hasQuestForRescue eq 0>> <div class="flexwrapper addGap5"> <<for _girl range $rescueRandomGirls>> <<capture _girl>> <div class="housecard"> <img @src="`assets/`+_girl.img" class="contactsImages"> <<print _girl.name>><br> @@.usebtn; <<link "Take" "Church">> <<set$currentRescueGirl to _girl.name>> <<set $hasQuestForRescue to 1>> <<set $rescueStage to 0>> <<include "randomizeRescueHouse">><</link>>@@ </div> <</capture>> <</for>> </div> <<elseif $hasQuestForRescue eq 1>> @@.mc-speech; I've already taken the missing poster for $currentRescueGirl, I need to find her first.@@<br> <<elseif $hasQuestForRescue eq 0>> @@.mc-speech; The nun said that the missing posters appear in the evening, around 6 PM.@@<br> <<elseif $hasQuestForRescue eq 2 or $hasQuestForRescue eq 3>> @@.mc-speech;First, I need to go see the nun. She should be at the church. @@ <</if>> <<else>> @@.mc-speech; Enough for today.@@<br> <</if>> <br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|Church]]@@ <br><<widget "includeTimeEventClothesHunt">> <<if $cursedHuntActive eq 1>> <<else>> <<include "add1">> <<include "event">> <<if _eventTriggered is false>> <<include "stealClothesEvent">> <</if>> <<if _stealClothesTriggered is false and _eventTriggered is false>> <<include "huntStart">> <</if>><</if>> <</widget>> <<widget "includeTimeEventHunt">> <<if $cursedHuntActive eq 1>> <<else>> <<include "add1">> <<include "event">> <<if _eventTriggered is false>> <<include "huntStart">> <</if>><</if>> <</widget>> <<widget "includeStyle">> <style> body { height: 100vh; They might be useful.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action; You put the tarot cards in your bag@@<br> <<set $tarotCardsStage to 1>> <</linkappend>> <br><br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|$return]]@@ <<elseif $currentFurniture == $placeForMonkeyPawOwaissa and $MonkeyPawStage eq 0>> @@.mc-thoughts; You come across a strange@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; paw.@@">><br> <img src="assets/cursedpossessions/monkeyPaw/monkeypaw.jpg" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-speech; Is this... the Monkey Paw? <br> I think I read something about it when I was younger.<br> It grants wishes, but always with tragic consequences. <br> Maybe if I'm careful, I can avoid any trouble? <br> I think I'll take the monkey paw with me. It might be useful.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action; You put monkey paw in your bag@@<br> <<set $MonkeyPawStage to 1>> <</linkappend>> <br><br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|$return]]@@ <<else>> @@.mc-thoughts;You try to find something, but it seems like nothing is there. @@ <br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|$return]]@@ <</if>> <<elseif $isElm eq 1>> <<if $isClothesStolen eq 1 and $currentFurniture eq $placeForClothesStolenElm>> <<include "findStolenClothes">> <br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|$return]]@@<br> <<elseif $currentFurniture == $placeForCursedItemElm and $gotCursedItem eq 0>> <<include "LFCI">> <<elseif $currentFurniture == $placeForRescueClueElm and $hasQuestForRescue eq 1 and $hasRescueClue neq 1>> <<include "rescueClueFound">> <<elseif $currentFurniture == $placeForTarotCardsElm and $tarotCardsStage eq 0>> @@.mc-thoughts; You come across a strange@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; deck of cards.@@">><br> <img src="assets/cursedpossessions/tarotCards/tarot.png" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-speech; Hmm... are these... tarot cards? <br> This deck looks so unusual... to find something, but it seems like nothing is there. @@ <br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Back|$return]]@@ <</if>> <</if>> <<done>> <<addclass ".linkselector" "disabled-link">> <</done>><<set $furnitureListOwaissa to [ "hallway_carpet", "hallway_wardrobe", "hallway_coatrack", "livingroom_table", "livingroom_sofa", "kitchen_desk", "kitchen_table", "kitchen_sink1", "bathroom_bathtub", "bathroom_carpet", "bathroom_sink", "bathroom_wmachine", "bedroom_bed2", "bedroom_table", "bedroom_wardrobe1" ]>> <<set $furnitureListElm to [ "basement_table", "basement_shelves", "kitchen_sink1", "kitchen_table", "kitchen_desk", "bathroom_sink", "bathroom_bathtub", "bathroom_wmachine", "bathroomTwo_sink", "bathroomTwo_carpet", "bedroom_bed1", "bedroom_table", "bedroom_wardrobe1", "bedroomTwo_table", "bedroomTwo_bed2", "bedroomTwo_shelves", "nursery_desk", "nursery_table", "nursery_bed", "hallway_carpet", "hallway_coatrack", "hallwayUpstairs_carpet", "hallwayUpstairs_shelves" ]>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to clone($furnitureListOwaissa)>> <<set $tempListElm to clone($furnitureListElm)>> <<set $placeForCursedItemOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.random()>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.filter(x => x != $placeForCursedItemOwaissa)>> <<set $placeForRescueClueOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.random()>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.filter(x => x != $placeForRescueClueOwaissa)>> <<set $placeForTarotCardsOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.random()>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.filter(x => x != $placeForTarotCardsOwaissa)>> <<set $placeForMonkeyPawOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.random()>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.filter(x => x != $placeForMonkeyPawOwaissa)>> <<set _check to random(1,2)>> <<if _check eq 1>> <<set $placeForCurseOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.random()>> <<set $tempListOwaissa to $tempListOwaissa.filter(x => x != $placeForCurseOwaissa)>> <</if>> <<set $placeForCursedItemElm to $tempListElm.random()>> <<set $tempListElm to $tempListElm.filter(x => x != $placeForCursedItemElm)>> <<set $placeForRescueClueElm to $tempListElm.random()>> <<set $tempListElm to $tempListElm.filter(x => x != $placeForRescueClueElm)>> <<set $placeForTarotCardsElm to $tempListElm.random()>> <<set $tempListElm to $tempListElm.filter(x => x != $placeForTarotCardsElm)>> <<set $placeForMonkeyPawElm to $tempListElm.random()>> <<set $tempListElm to $tempListElm.filter(x => x != $placeForMonkeyPawElm)>> <<if _check eq 2>> <<set $placeForCurseElm to $tempListElm.random()>> <<set $tempListElm to $tempListElm.filter(x => x != $placeForCurseElm)>> <</if>><<set _randomIndex to random(0, $tornStyles.length - 1)>> <<set $tornStyleRandom to $tornStyles[_randomIndex]>> <<set $randomRescuePhotoNumber to random(1,16)>> <<if $rescueStage eq 0>> <<include "rescueSuccess">> <<elseif $rescueStage eq 1 and $hours lt 18>> <<set _chanceSuccess to 100 - ($hours * 100 / 18)>> <<set _randomValue to random(1, 100)>> <<if _randomValue <= _chanceSuccess>> <<include "rescueSuccess">> <<else>> <<include "rescuePossessed">> <</if>> <<else>> <<include "rescuePossessed">> <</if>> <<set $rescueQuestCD to 1>> <img src="assets/rescue/Rain.jpg" width="50%" class="displayCentredImgs"><br> <<if ndef $relationshipWithRain>> <<set $relationshipWithRain to 0>> @@.notmc-speech; $mc.name, hey. I’m Rain. The witch told me about you. Thanks for agreeing to help.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Of course. Though it’s kind of strange that you know a witch.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Well, she used to serve the church but left the order for some reasons.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;An order?@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; We help people who are haunted by them, day after day. Sometimes we just perform cleansing rituals, and sometimes we have to do an exorcism. Basically, we’re doing what you do, but with an organization behind it.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Sounds interesting. Can I join?@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Not right now. But if you prove yourself to be a good ghost hunter, we might consider it.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Alright, but I’m here for something else. Tell me about the missing girls.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Listen closely. There’s a board with photos of the missing girls right outside the church. It has their names and pictures. <br><em><b>We update it every day at 6 PM</b></em>, since some girls get found and some stay missing.<br><br> If you want to help, just take one of the posters from the board.<br> Now, about where to look: there are lots of old, abandoned houses in the southern part of the city. Most of the missing girls end up there, but none of them originally went that way. They went to places on Owaissa Street or Elm Street and somehow ended up south.<br><br> <em><b>You’ve got two options: either head straight south and search every house, which will take a while, or start on Owaissa or Elm and try to find clues that point to a specific house in the south.</b></em><br> But remember, you’ve got limited time. <em><b>You need to find the girl by 6 PM the next day.</b></em> After that, it’s too late, and we’ll have to send in more experienced hunters.<br><br> <em><b>And one more thing: the longer the girl stays missing, the worse things could get. Take a bottle of holy water, just in case.</b></em>@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Alright, I think I got it. Thanks.@@<br> <br> @@.mc-action; Now I can assist Rain in the search for the missing girls.@@<br> <</if>> <<set $hasRescueClue to 0>> <<if $hasQuestForRescue eq 2>> @@.notmc-speech; This is bad, I'll have to send an experienced ghost hunter to search for her, even though I have very few people available.@@<br> <<if $relationshipWithRain eq 0>> <<else>> <<set $relationshipWithRain -= 1>> @@.mc-thoughts; Your relationship with Rain has decreased - $relationshipWithRain.@@ <</if>> <<elseif $hasQuestForRescue eq 3>> @@.notmc-speech;Oh, $mc.name, I've already been informed that you found our girl, thank you so much. You've been a great help to me, thank you.<br>@@ <<if $equipment.sb neq 3>> @@.notmc-speech;I hope you’ll be able to keep helping us. <br> I don't have anything to give you in return for your help right now, but maybe I can repay you somehow later.@@<br> <<set $equipment.sb to 3>> @@.mc-action; You get a lvl 3 Spiritbox @@<img src="assets/img/spiritbox.png" style="max-width:5%"><br><br><</if>> <<set $relationshipWithRain += 1>> @@.mc-thoughts; Your relationship with Rain has increased - $relationshipWithRain now!@@<br> <</if>> <br><br> <<done>> <<addclass ".linkselector" "disabled-link">> <</done>> @@.backbtn; [[Back|Church][$hasQuestForRescue to 0]]@@<br><<set _check to random(1,3)>> <<if _check eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/1.0.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> <<if _check eq 2>><video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/2.0.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> <<if _check eq 3>> <img src="assets/rescue/Jade/3.0.jpg" width="100%"> <</if>> @@.mc-thoughts; You slowly regain consciousness, your head throbbing with pain, and the first thing you feel is the tight ropes binding your wrists. You try to move, but your hands and legs are tied up. Flashes of memory come back to you: you came here to save $currentRescueGirl. But something went wrong. <br> You sense someone nearby. A wave of anxiety builds in your chest. Suddenly, you hear a voice@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Well, well, baby, you're finally awake?@@<br> @@.mc-speech; $currentRescueGirl? What the hell is going on?!@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; She laughs, but there's something off about it, something eerie that makes you tense up.<br> You realize it's not Jade anymore. Whoever’s standing in front of you, it’s not $currentRescueGirl.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Hey, let me go! Whatever you are, just let me go!@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; She leans in closer, her breath brushing against your skin. Her voice drops, almost whispering @@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Of course, I’ll let you go... but not before we <<linkappend "have a little fun first. ">> <<if _check eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/1.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> @@.mc-thoughts; She started to rub your pussy at a furious pace. Your moans began to spread throughout the house, but she didn’t show you any mercy.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; OH~ Fuck~ I'm going to...@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; She latched onto your pussy and began to greedily [[suck on your clit.|rescueJadePossessed1][$rescueJadePossessed to 1]]@@<br> <</if>> <<if _check eq 2>> <<set _checkR to random(1,2)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/2.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> <<if _checkR eq 2>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/2.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> @@.notmc-speech; Oh~ we're going to have so much fun together.@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; With those words, she started touching your body greedily, sending small shivers through you every time she touched your sensitive spots.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; No, don't touch me, ah~@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; I can see you're starting to enjoy this. Haha, [[what if I just...|rescueJadePossessed1][$rescueJadePossessed to 2]]@@<br> <</if>> <<if _check eq 3>> <<set _checkR to random(1,3)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/3.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> <<if _checkR eq 2>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/3.2.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> <<if _checkR eq 3>> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Jade/3.3.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> <</if>> @@.notmc-speech; Oh~ we're going to have so much fun together.@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; With those words, she started touching your body greedily, sending small shivers through you every time she touched your sensitive spots.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; No, don't touch me, ah~@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; I can see you're starting to enjoy this. Haha, [[what if I just...|rescueJadePossessed1][$rescueJadePossessed to 3]]@@<br> <</if>> <</linkappend>>@@<video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Nadia/1.0.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> @@.notmc-speech; Do you like this, $mc.name?@@<br> @@.mc-speech;What the hell? Wait... how do you <<linkappend "know my...">> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Nadia/1.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> @@.notmc-speech;Shh, I want you right now...@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Wait, [[what are you doing?|rescueNadiaPossessed1]] Ah~@@<br> <</linkappend>>@@<<set _check to random(1,3)>> <<if _check eq 1>> <img src="assets/rescue/Victoria/1.0.jpg" width="100%"> @@.mc-thoughts; You woke up in a dark, damp place. It seems like the basement of that same house. <br> Your head still hurts, and you’re struggling to come to your senses@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Ugh... my head...@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Where am I? $currentRescueGirl, is that you? Help me!@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Hello, sweetheart. Were you trying to save your little friend? You’re too late... She’s under my control now, completely.@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; Fuck! It seems that ghost has taken control of her... looks like I have a problem. @@<br> @@.mc-speech; Why are you doing this? Let her go and me too, we’ll leave and never come back.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Ha, no way. You don’t interest me much, but I’ll still <<linkappend "teach you a lesson before I let you go.">> <video autoplay controls muted loop> <source src="assets/rescue/Victoria/1.1.mp4" type="video/mp4"> </video> @@.mc-speech; Ah~ don't touch me!@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; What a juicy slut I've got here. I would've taken over you, but maybe one day I’ll get the chance...@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; She kisses you again, and everything goes black.@@<br> <</if>> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Wake up|Church][$hours += 3]]@@<br>@@.mc-thoughts; You stepped into the abandoned house, a place that had long since fallen into decay and been forgotten. Right from the doorway, something felt off — the air was strangely thick, almost heavy on your skin, and a voice deep inside whispered of danger.<br> And then, everything changed. The house started shifting before your eyes. The cracked, worn-out walls were now freshly painted, the dusty old furniture suddenly looked brand new and spotless. Lights flickered on, flooding the place with a cozy glow — the house had transformed into a perfect, normal home, like nothing had ever been wrong.<br> But something was off. You knew it was all fake. An illusion, a trap.<br> Your instincts screamed that this place was dangerous, and you found yourself torn — should you keep searching or turn back while you still could?<br>@@ @@.mc-speech; This has to be the right place. You quickly start throwing holy water toward the ghost. <br> It lets out a loud hiss, like the water's burning it from the inside. The ghost pulls away from $currentRescueGirl and disappears.@@<br> @@.mc-speech;Let's get out of here before it comes back!@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; You grab her arm, and the two of you bolt out of the house.<br> She thanks you for saving her and says she'll tell the nun about your help.@@<br> <br><br> @@.backbtn; [[Leave|Church][$hasQuestForRescue to 3]]@@<br> <</linkreplace>> <</if>></span>@@.mc-thoughts; You stepped into the abandoned house, a place that had long since fallen into decay and been forgotten. Right from the doorway, something felt off — the air was strangely thick, almost heavy on your skin, and a voice deep inside whispered of danger.<br> And then, everything changed. The house started shifting before your eyes. The cracked, worn-out walls were now freshly painted, the dusty old furniture suddenly looked brand new and spotless. Lights flickered on, flooding the place with a cozy glow — the house had transformed into a perfect, normal home, like nothing had ever been wrong.<br> But something was off. You knew it was all fake. An illusion, a trap.<br> Your instincts screamed that this place was dangerous, and you found yourself torn — should you keep searching or turn back while you still could?<br>@@ @@.mc-speech; This has to be the right place. But should I keep going? There's something seriously wrong with this place... maybe I should leave while I can.@@<br><br> <span id="choiceRescuePossessed">@@.usebtn; [[Leave|rescueMap]] @@<b>or</b></span><<linkreplace "@@.usebtn; Continue@@">> <<replace "#choiceRescuePossessed">><</replace>> @@.mc-thoughts; You're walking down the hallway of the old house when you hear some weird slurping sounds that catch your attention. But as you keep walking, you start to notice something strange. People are staring. Almost everyone you pass glances your way. ".cardlink" "disabled-link">> <<stop>> <</if>> <</repeat>> <</linkreplace>>@@ <</nobr>> <<nobr>> <span id="ironcladReceptionPlasmButton">@@.adaptiveLink;<<linkreplace "Use @@color:yellow;E@@ctoglass">><<addclass ".cardlink" "disabled-link">> <span id="ironcladReceptionPlasm"> <<showmeter 'searchReceptionIroncladPlasm' ` $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm / $equipment.glass`>> </span> <<repeat `$timerToolsDecreased`>> <<if $hotAct eq 1>><<set $mc.sanity -= $sanityIfHot>><</if>> <<if $reception.background eq 2>><<set $mc.sanity -= $sanityInTheDark>><</if>> <<include "add1">> <<if $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm neq $equipment.glass>><<if $cursedHuntActive eq 1>> <<else>> <<include "lightPassageGhost">><<include "event">> <<if _eventTriggered is false>> <<include "huntStart">> <</if>><</if>><</if>> <<if $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm lte ($equipment.glass - 1)>> <<set $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm += 1>> <<updatemeter 'searchReceptionIroncladPlasm' ` $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm / $equipment.glass`>> <<elseif $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm gte $equipment.glass>> <<replace "#actionironcladReception">><<include "PlasmCheck">><</replace>> <<replace "#ironcladReceptionPlasm">><</replace>> <<set $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.plasm to 0>> <<removeclass ".cardlink" "disabled-link">> <<stop>> <</if>> <</repeat>> <</linkreplace>>@@ <</nobr>> <<nobr>> <span id="ironcladReceptionSpiritboxButton">@@.adaptiveLink;<<linkreplace "Use @@color:yellow;S@@piritbox">> <<if $reception.background eq 1>> <<replace "#actionironcladReception">><div class="spiritbox-container mc-thoughts"> I need to turn off the light first</div><</replace>> <<else>><<addclass ".cardlink" "disabled-link">> <span id="ironcladReceptionSpiritbox"> <<showmeter 'searchReceptionIroncladSpiritbox' ` $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox / $equipment.sb`>> </span> <<repeat `$timerToolsDecreased`>> <<if $hotAct eq 1>><<set $mc.sanity -= $sanityIfHot>><</if>> <<if $reception.background eq 2>><<set $mc.sanity -= $sanityInTheDark>><</if>> <<include "add1">> <<if $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox neq $equipment.sb>><<if $cursedHuntActive eq 1>> <<else>> <<include "lightPassageGhost">><<include "event">> <<if _eventTriggered is false>> <<include "huntStart">> <</if>><</if>><</if>> <<if $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox lte ($equipment.sb - 1)>> <<set $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox += 1>> <<updatemeter 'searchReceptionIroncladSpiritbox' ` $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox / $equipment.sb`>> <<elseif $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox gte $equipment.sb>> <<replace "#actionironcladReception">><<include "SpiritboxCheck">><</replace>> <<replace "#ironcladReceptionSpiritbox">><</replace>> <<set $currentsearchReceptionIronclad.spiritbox to 0>> <<removeclass ".cardlink" "disabled-link">><<stop>> <</if>> <</repeat>> <</if>> <</linkreplace>>@@</span> <</nobr>><<nobr>> <div class="room"> <div class="room-wrapper"> <div class="content"> <div <div class="footer-card"> <div class="cardimg"> <a data-passage="failedComp"> <img src="assets/img/questionMark.png" class="companion-image"> </a> </div> </div> <<elseif $showComp eq 3>> <div class="footer-card"> <div class="cardimg"> <<compLinksSuccess>> </div> </div> <</if>> <div class="footer-card footer-light"> <span class="cursedHuntLinkDisable"><<link [img[assets/img/lighton.png][IroncladBlockACellA]]>><<set $BlockACellA.background to 1>><</link>> <<link [img[assets/img/lightoff.png][IroncladBlockACellA]]>><<set $BlockACellA.background to 2>><</link>> <<if $mc.lust gte 80 and $weakenTheGhostQuest and $isWeakenGhost neq 1>> <<link [img[assets/img/hearth.png][minigame]]>> <<set $minigameVideo to "start">> <<set $ghostOrgasmMeter to 0>> <<set $mcOrgasmMeter to 0>><</link>> <</if>></span> </div> </div> <div class="footeraction"> @@.adaptiveLink;<<link "BlockA" "IroncladBlockA">> <<includeTimeEventHunt>><<set $stepCount += 1>><</link>>@@ </div> </div> </div> </div> <</nobr>><<nobr>> <img src="assets/room/ironclad/ironclad.webp" width="90%"><br> @@.location; Prison "Ironclad"@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; Ironclad Prison, once a symbol of justice, now stands abandoned, its long and storied past cloaked in shadows. Whispers speak of restless spirits wandering its halls—a chilling reminder of the darkness it once held.@@<br> <br> <<if $wardenClothesStage eq 2>> @@.movebtn;[[Go inside|IroncladHallway][$ghostHuntingMode to 2]]@@<br> <<else>> @@.movebtn; <<linkreplace "Go inside">> <<set $wardenClothesStage to 0>> <<set $mc.energy to 0>> @@.mc-thoughts; You walk through the prison, exploring every room. But nothing happens.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Something's not right. This is definitely the place, but there are no ghosts... I guess I should ask the witch. @@<br><br> @@.backbtn; [[Return home|Home][$hours += 6; $isIronclad to 0]] @@<br> <</linkreplace>>@@ <</if>> <br> <br> <<if $ghostHuntingMode eq 2>><span class="movebtn">[[End the hunt|HuntOverManual][$ghostHuntingMode to 3]]</span><<else>><</if>> <</nobr>> <<nobr>> <div class="room"> <div class="room-wrapper"> <div class="content"> <div $isWeakenGhost neq 1>> <<link [img[assets/img/hearth.png][minigame]]>> <<set $minigameVideo to "start">> <<set $ghostOrgasmMeter to 0>> <<set $mcOrgasmMeter to 0>><</link>> <</if>></span> </div> </div> <div class="footeraction"> @@.adaptiveLink;<<link "BlockA" "IroncladBlockA">> <<includeTimeEventHunt>><<set $stepCount += 1>><</link>>@@ </div> </div> </div> </div> <</nobr>><<set $BlockA to { name: "BlockA", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockB to { name: "BlockB", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockACellA to { name: "BlockACellA", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockACellB to { name: "BlockACellB", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockACellC to { name: "BlockACellC", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockBCellA to { name: "BlockBCellA", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockBCellB to { name: "BlockBCellB", background: 2, }>> <<set $BlockBCellC to { name: "BlockBCellC", background: 2, }>> <<set $reception to { name: "reception", background: 2, }>> <<set $updateIronclad to 2>><<if $findGhostInfoCD eq 1>> @@.mc-speech; I already searched for information today. I think it's better to try again tomorrow.@@<<else>> <<linkreplace "Find information about ghosts">> <<set $findGhostInfoCD to 1>> <<include "add60">> <<set _chance to random(1, 100)>> <<set _ghosts to []>> <<if $ghostOniInfoCollected neq 1>> <<set _ghosts.push("Oni")>><</if>> <<if $ghostJinnInfoCollected neq 1>> <<set _ghosts.push("Jinn")>><</if>> <<if $ghostDeogenInfoCollected neq 1>> <<set _ghosts.push("Deogen")>><</if>> <<if $ghostDemonInfoCollected neq 1>> <<set _ghosts.push("Demon")>><</if>> <<if _ghosts.length > 0>> <<set _chanceToFindInfo to 50>> <<if _chance lte _chanceToFindInfo>> <<set _selectedGhost to _ghosts[random(0, _ghosts.length - 1)]>> <<if _selectedGhost is "Oni">> &emsp;&emsp;As you scroll through the information about ghosts, you come across details about @@.mc-speech;the Oni!@@<br> &emsp;&emsp;The mythical entity Oni brings not only fear but also rapid psychological devastation. Those who have encountered it report that @@.notmc-speech;Oni causes a sharp and intense decline in sanity@@, significantly accelerating this process compared to other ghosts. If you come face-to-face with Oni, be prepared for a swift and severe assault on your mental health.<br> &emsp;&emsp; @@.mc-speech;Information about the Oni has been added to the Ghostpedia (ghost icon on the screen).@@ <<set $ghostOniInfoCollected to 1>> <<elseif _selectedGhost is "Jinn">> &emsp;&emsp;As you scroll through the information about ghosts, you come across details about @@.mc-speech;the Jinn!@@<br> &emsp;&emsp; Some ghost hunters have reported that when encountering a Jinn, they tried to run but always failed because the ghost is too fast. However, when they found a hiding spot—even if it was right in front of the Jinn—he often passed by without noticing them. This indicates that hiding from a Jinn is much easier than trying to escape.<br> &emsp;&emsp; @@.mc-speech;Information about the Jinn has been added to the Ghostpedia (ghost icon on the screen).@@ <<set $ghostJinnInfoCollected to 1>> <<elseif _selectedGhost is "Deogen">> &emsp;&emsp;As you scroll through the information about ghosts, you come across details about @@.mc-speech;the Deogen!@@<br> &emsp;&emsp;The Deogen is described as a particularly frightening ghost that will always find you, even if you try to hide. Once it starts its hunt, hiding won’t help, as the Deogen relentlessly searches for its prey. However, since the Deogen is extremely slow, there’s a chance to escape if you still have the strength to run.<br> &emsp;&emsp; @@.mc-speech;Information about the Deogen has been added to the Ghostpedia (ghost icon on the screen).@@ <<set $ghostDeogenInfoCollected to 1>> <<elseif _selectedGhost is "Demon">> &emsp;&emsp;As you scroll through the information about ghosts, you come across details about @@.mc-speech;the Demon!@@<br> &emsp;&emsp; Some sources report that the Demon is a unique ghost that can begin hunting you regardless of your current sanity or lust. Unlike other ghosts that only become active when your mental state declines or your desire increases, the Demon does not consider your present condition and can initiate its pursuit at any time.<br> &emsp;&emsp; @@.mc-speech;Information about the Demon has been added to the Ghostpedia (ghost icon on the screen).@@ <<set $ghostDemonInfoCollected to 1>> <</if>> <<else>> @@.mc-thoughts; You search for ghost information online for an hour but find nothing useful.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; That's enough for today. Maybe i'll get lucky and find something tomorrow.@@<br> <</if>> <<else>> @@.mc-thoughts;You scrolled the internet for an hour, but didn’t find any new information. It seems like you won’t be able to find anything else here.@@ <</if>> <</linkreplace>> <</if>><div class="flexwrapper backgroundForText"> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooFace>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooFace.jpg" class="iconPx"><br> <span class="priceAmount">100$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+2 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 100>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooFace to "worn">> <<set $mc.beauty += 2>> <<set $mc.money -= 100>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>><</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooNeck>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooNeck.webp" class="iconPx"><br> <span class="priceAmount">80$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+2 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 80>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooNeck to "worn">> <<set $mc.beauty += 2>> <<set $mc.money -= 80>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>><</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooHand>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooHand.jpg" class="iconPx"> <span class="priceAmount">50$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+1 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 50>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooHand to "worn">> <<set $mc.beauty += 1>> <<set $mc.money -= 50>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>><</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooChest>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooChest.jpg" class="iconPx"><br> <<if $mc.corruption gte 5>> <span class="priceAmount">150$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+3 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 150>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooChest to "worn">> <<set $mc.money -= 150>> <<set $mc.beauty += 3>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>> <<else>> @@.warningtext; Req. 5+ <img src="assets/img/corruption.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;">@@<br> <</if>> <</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooPussy>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooPussy.webp" class="iconPx"><br> <<if $mc.corruption gte 5>> <span class="priceAmount">200$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+3 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 200>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooPussy to "worn">> <<set $mc.money -= 200>> <<set $mc.beauty += 3>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>> <<else>> @@.warningtext; Req. 5+ <img src="assets/img/corruption.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;">@@<br> <</if>> <</if>> </div> <div class="housecard"> <<if ndef $tattooAss>> <img src="assets/img/tattoos/tattooAss.jpg" class="iconPx"><br> <<if $mc.corruption gte 5>> <span class="priceAmount">350$</span><br> <span class="mc-thoughts">+3 <img src="assets/img/beauty.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;"></span><br> <<if $mc.money gte 350>> @@.buyItemLink;<<link "Buy" "BeautySalonTattoos">> <<set $tattooAss to "worn">> <<set $mc.money -= 350>> <<set $mc.beauty += 3>> <</link>>@@<br> <<else>>@@.mc-thoughts; I don't have enough money@@<</if>> <<else>> @@.warningtext; Req. 5+ <img src="assets/img/corruption.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:30px; display: inline; margin: 0;">@@<br> <</if>> <</if>> </div> </div> <br> @@.backbtn;[[Leave|BeautySalonInside]] @@<br> <style> body { background-image: url('assets/img/beautySalonInside.jpg'); background-size: cover; background-repeat: no-repeat; } </style><<set $currentsearchHallwayIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchReceptionIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchKitchenIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockAIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockBIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockACellAIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockACellBIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockACellCIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockBCellAIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockBCellBIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $currentsearchBlockBCellCIronclad to { emf:0, plasm:0, uvl:0, temperature:0, spiritbox:0, gwb:0, }>> <<set $fixSave to 1>><img src="assets/img/park.jpg" width="100%"> @@.location; Park@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; This park, where green plantings seamlessly transition into forest, offers solitude and a connection to nature, providing a space for relaxation and outdoor activities. @@<br> <<if $sportswear>> <<if $hours lte 5 or $hours gte 22>> @@.mc-thoughts; Not the best time for training.@@<br> <<else>> <<if $joggingCD eq 1>> @@.mc-speech; Enough for today...@@<br> <<else>> <<if $mc.energy gte 2>> @@.enterbtn; [[Jogging|ParkJogging][$mc.energy -= 2]]<img src="assets/img/energy.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:20px;"> @@<br> <<else>> @@.mc-speech; Not enough energy@@ <img src="assets/img/energy.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:3%;"><br> <</if>> <</if>> <</if>> <<else>> @@.mc-speech; I need to buy sportswear.@@<br> <</if>> <br> <br> <br> @@.backbtn;[[Leave|CityMap]]@@<br> <<if previous(2) is "Park">><<include "add1">> <<elseif previous() is "CityMap">><<include "add20">> <<else>><<include "add1">> <</if>><div id="minigame_mainvideo"> <<minigameVideo>> <b> <<if $ghostOrgasmMeter lte 0>><<set "assets/minigame/sex/36.webp"}]>> <</if>> <</if>> <<set _randomIndex to random(0, _videoList.length - 1)>> <<set _selectedVideo to _videoList[_randomIndex]>> <<if _selectedVideo.type == "video">> <video autoplay controls muted loop class="displayCentredImgs"> <source @src="_selectedVideo.src" type="video/mp4"> </video> <<else>> <img @src="_selectedVideo.src" alt="Image" class="displayCentredImgs"><br> <</if>> <</widget>> <<widget "minigameMenu">> <<if $minigameVideo eq "start">> Beauty: $mc.beauty<br> <<unset $minigameEventFailed>> <<if $mc.energy lt 1>> @@.mc-thoughts; Not enough energy@@ <<else>> <<link "@@.usebtn; Try to attract a ghost@@ " "minigame">> <<set $mc.energy -= 1>> <<set _chance to random(30, 100)>> <<if _chance lte $mc.beauty>> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 0>> <<set $minigameVideo to "seduce">> <<else>> <<set $minigameVideo to "seduceFailed">> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 1>> <</if>> <</link>><</if>> | <<link "@@color:red; Leave@@" `$return`>><<unset $minigameVideo>><</link>> <<elseif $minigameVideo eq "seduce">> <<link "Continue" "minigame">> <<set $mc.energy += 0.2>> <<if $mc.energy gte $mc.energyMax>> <<set $mc.energy to $mc.energyMax>> <</if>> <<set $mcOrgasmMeter += random(4,8)>> <<set $ghostOrgasmMeter += random(2,6)>> <<if $ghostOrgasmMeter gte 100>> <<elseif $mcOrgasmMeter gte 100>> <<else>> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 0>> <<set _checkR to random(1,3)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <<set $minigameVideo to "slapface">> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <<set $minigameVideo to "assjob">> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <<set $minigameVideo to "titjob">> <</if>> <</if>> <</link>><b><img src="assets/img/hearth.png" style="position: relative; top: 0.375em; width:25px;"></b> | <<link "@@color:red; Try to leave@@" "minigame">> <<set _check to random(1,2)>> <<if _check eq 1>> <<unset $minigameVideo>> <<goto `$return`>> <<elseif _check eq 2>> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 1>> <<set _checkR to random(1,3)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <<set $minigameVideo to "slapface">> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <<set $minigameVideo to "assjob">> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <<set $minigameVideo to "titjob">> <</if>> <</if>> <</link>> <<elseif $minigameVideo eq "seduceFailed">> <b>Beauty: $mc.beauty</b><br> <<if $mc.energy lt 1>> @@.mc-thoughts; Not enough energy@@ <<else>> <<link "@@.usebtn; Try again@@ " "minigame">> <<set $mc.energy -= 1>> <<set _chance to random(30, 100)>> <<if _chance lte $mc.beauty>> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 0>> <<set _checkR to random(1,3)>> <<if _checkR eq 1>> <<set $minigameVideo to "slapface">> <<elseif _checkR eq 2>> <<set $minigameVideo to "assjob">> <<elseif _checkR eq 3>> <<set $minigameVideo to "titjob">> <</if>> <<else>> <<set $minigameVideo to "seduceFailed">> <<set $minigameEventFailed to 1>> <</if>> <</link>><</if>> | <<link "@@color:red; Leave@@ " `$return`>><<unset $minigameVideo>><</link>> <<elseif $minigameVideo eq "slapface">> <<if $mc.energy lt 1>> Hi, Rain. A witch told me you could help me...@@<br> <<if $relationshipWithRain gte 5>> @@.notmc-speech; Yes, of course. You've helped me before, and I'm ready to assist you. What's the matter?@@<br> @@.mc-speech; There's some kind of ghost or entity in my house. It's been there for a while, unlike the others, which would leave... once they got what they wanted.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; If it doesn't leave, it's more complicated. Holy water won't help...<br> I think an exorcism is necessary. Here's what we can do: I'll give you a book that will allow you to summon this entity. Once it appears, you'll need to recite a spell from the book. That should make it disappear.<br>@@ @@.mc-speech; That sounds too easy.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; There are some... nuances: you must ensure no one else is in the house when you do this, or you might summon the wrong spirit...@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Uh... How can I be sure of that? What if I'm not even aware there's a ghost in my house?<br>@@ @@.notmc-speech; I'll give you an amulet - it's made from a special material. If there's any entity in your home, the amulet will grow warm and change color. If there's nothing, it'll remain unchanged.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Oh, thank you. I'll do my best to get rid of this entity.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Unfortunately, I can't help directly. This ghost seems to be connected to you in some way, and my interference might complicate things. You must do this alone.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Understood. Thanks again.@@<br> @@.notmc-speech; Good luck.@@<br><br> @@.mc-action; I need to summon a ghost in my house using the book Rain gave me@@<br> <<set $exorcismQuestStage to 1>> <<set $amulet to 1>> <<else>> @@.notmc-speech; I'm sorry, I'm swamped right now - I need to find some missing nuns. If you help me with this, I'll be glad to assist you in return. You know what to do, so come back to me once you've helped me find a few of my girls.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Alright.@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; I need to help her <<print 5 - $relationshipWithRain>> more times.@@<br> <</if>> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Leave|Church]] @@<br><<if $ghostSpiritEventStage eq 0 or $thetwinsevent eq 1 or $ghostMareEventStart neq 0 or $gotCursedItem eq 1>> <img src="assets/img/amulet1.png" class="displayCentredImgs"> <<else>> <img src="assets/img/amulet0.png" class="displayCentredImgs"> <</if>> @@.mc-speech; Rain talked about the amulet and how it reacts to the presence of ghosts... <br> <<if $exorcismQuestStage eq 2>> @@.mc-thoughts; $succubusEventTimer days left...@@<br><</if>> I've got everything set up: the book with the incantation is open before me, the words waiting to be spoken. All I need to do now is to begin the summoning ritual...<br>@@ @@.usebtn; [[Begin the summoning ritual|summoningStart][$exorcismCD to 1]]@@<br> <br> @@.backbtn; [[Leave|Bedroom]]@@<<if $ghostSpiritEventStage eq 0>> <img src="assets/exorcism/spirit.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"><br> @@.mc-thoguhts; You start reading the words from the ancient book, your lips slowly forming each sound, each word like a whisper filling the room. You feel the energy growing around you, each syllable resonating in the air,@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; calling something invisible@@">> <img src="assets/exorcism/spirit1.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-thoughts; You notice a figure appearing right behind you in the mirror reflection, its eyes filled with@@ @@.enterbtn;[[unnatural lust|summonSpirit]]@@<br> <</linkappend>> <<elseif $thetwinsevent eq 1>> <img src="assets/succubus/succubus.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-thoguhts; You start reading the words from the ancient book, your lips slowly forming each sound, each word like a whisper filling the room. You feel the energy growing around you, each syllable resonating in the air,@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; calling something invisible@@">><br> @@.mc-thoughts; But nothing happens@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Did I do something wrong?@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; Suddenly, you feel a growing sense of weakness and fatigue. Barely reaching your bed, you fall into a deep@@ @@.enterbtn;[[sleep|summonTwins]]@@ <</linkappend>> <<elseif $ghostMareEventStart neq 0>> <img src="assets/succubus/succubus.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-thoguhts; You start reading the words from the ancient book, your lips slowly forming each sound, each word like a whisper filling the room. You feel the energy growing around you, each syllable resonating in the air,@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; calling something invisible@@">><br> @@.mc-thoughts; But nothing happens@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Did I do something wrong?@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; Suddenly, you feel a growing sense of weakness and fatigue. Barely reaching your bed, you fall into a deep@@ @@.enterbtn;[[sleep|summonMare]]@@ <</linkappend>> <<elseif $gotCursedItem eq 1>> <img src="assets/exorcism/tentacles.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-thoguhts; You start reading the words from the ancient book, your lips slowly forming each sound, each word like a whisper filling the room. You feel the energy growing around you, each syllable resonating in the air,@@ <<linkappend "@@.usebtn; calling something invisible@@">><br> @@.mc-thoughts; But nothing happens@@<br> @@.mc-speech; Did I do something wrong?@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; Suddenly, you feel a growing sense of weakness and fatigue. Barely reaching your bed, you fall into a deep@@ @@.enterbtn;[[sleep|summonTentacles]]@@ <</linkappend>> <<elseif $exorcismQuestStage eq 1>> <img src="assets/succubus/succubus0.jpg" width="100%" class="displayCentredImgs"> @@.mc-thoughts; You speak the words of the summoning, and the air around you grows denser. From the darkness, the succubus emerges, her smile dripping with mockery and pleasure.@@<br> @@color:red; Finally, you've reached me, my sweet. Decided to play the hunter, have you?@@<br> @@.mc-thoughts; You begin to read the lines from the book, hoping to banish her, but nothing happens. The succubus just laughs, seeing your futile attempts.@@<br> @@color:red; You naive thing! Do you think you can just banish me like that? You have no idea who you're dealing with, baby.@@<br> @@.mc-speech; What do you think of yourself? I'll get rid of you like all the others!@@<br> @@color:red; Oh, honey, you're so naive. I actually enjoy being here with you, especially when I can play with your pussy. Listen, I have a proposition: let's make a deal. I'll help you with your ghost hunts, or...
